chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA N0.0-267 2018 Dale 0r Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.10.2018, For orders on office objections. For orders on naintainabiliu C an case Mr Naushad Ali Tagar, advocate for the petitioner alongwith the petitioner Mr, Aboul Rasheed Abro Asst Attorney General Learned Counsel f0٢ the petitioner states tnat far the grievance agitated by the petitioner in the instant petition with regard displaying the merit Iist is concerned the same has been redressed; however, the candidates who were not eligible for the appointment on the post of Mail Peon Runner (BPS-02) have been appointed ignoring the merit the petitioner, on tnat the petitioner would seek his remedy in accordance with |3w, Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of JUDGE JUDGE
